title: ozothamnus antennaria
intro: Ozothamnus antennaria, also known as silver ragwort or silvertop bush, is a shrub native to Australia, known for its silvery-green foliage and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of essential oils, particularly cineole and borneol. The medicinal properties of Ozothamnus antennaria have been found to provide health benefits such as relief from colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Ozothamnus antennaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
